rationale: Both correctly bisect the regression to PR #4834 and land on the same plausible test-vs-guard diagnosis, but both overreach by confidently declaring the issue already fixed and closeable — the actual thread shows no such resolution, only Flink-ddd asking yenuo26 to trigger a full CI sleep-mode test, i.e. still unresolved. Y engages more with the real thread (names yenuo26's bisection, ties in the companion generate() admission guard) and gives sharper, more specific line citations plus practical guidance for runtime (non-CI) users, while X pads its output with unrelated skill-candidate scaffolding (HunyuanImage3, issue #4891) that has nothing to do with #4905, hurting completeness and focus.
